findings.summary: Single-pin net: J1.Pin_1 only connects to J1.1 (Pin_1) (passive)
findings.description: Net '__unnamed_10' has exactly one pin: J1.1 (Pin_1), pin_type='passive'. Verify the intended target — if this pin should connect somewhere, the wire/label is missing.
findings.recommendation: Check the schematic at the referenced pin — add the missing wire or place a no-connect marker if the pin is intentionally floating.

report_context.impact: Passive or unclassified pin lonely on its own net.

report_context.impact: Passive or unclassified pin lonely on its own net.

findings.summary: IC power pin U1.1 (VI) has no DC path to a power rail (net '__unnamed_0')
findings.description: Pin U1.1 (VI) is type=power_in on net '__unnamed_0'. Graph walk (≤2 hops, rejecting capacitor edges, accepting resistors≤1Ω, inductors, ferrite beads, bridged solder jumpers) did not reach a named power rail. The pin is likely AC-coupled to ground only — the IC will not power up reliably.
findings.recommendation: Verify the schematic for this pin: the DC route must go through a conducting element (direct wire, 0Ω resistor, inductor, ferrite bead, or bridged solder jumper) — not a capacitor. If the intent was to tie VCC through an LC filter, add the missing inductor or 0Ω in series.

report_context.impact: IC supply floats DC; board will not run.

top_issues.summary: IC power pin U1.1 (VI) has no DC path to a power rail (net '__unnamed_0')
top_issues.description: Pin U1.1 (VI) is type=power_in on net '__unnamed_0'. Graph walk (≤2 hops, rejecting capacitor edges, accepting resistors≤1Ω, inductors, ferrite beads, bridged solder jumpers) did not reach a named power rail. The pin is likely AC-coupled to ground only — the IC will not power up reliably.
top_issues.recommendation: Verify the schematic for this pin: the DC route must go through a conducting element (direct wire, 0Ω resistor, inductor, ferrite bead, or bridged solder jumper) — not a capacitor. If the intent was to tie VCC through an LC filter, add the missing inductor or 0Ω in series.
